name: vcp-s3-browser-app
description: AWS Amplify S3 Storage Browser plugin with TypeScript models, React UI library, and standalone app

scripts.ca:login: aws codeartifact login --tool npm --repository vcp-react-components --domain virtusasystems --domain-owner 787952688011 --region us-east-1
scripts.publish:ui:patch: cd s3-browser-app && pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
scripts.publish:ui:minor: cd s3-browser-app && pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
scripts.publish:ui:major: cd s3-browser-app && pnpm version major --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
scripts.publish:ts:patch: cd typescript && pnpm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
scripts.publish:ts:minor: cd typescript && pnpm version minor --no-git-tag-version && pnpm publish --no-git-checks --registry https://virtusasystems-787952688011.d.codeartifact.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/npm/vcp-react-components/
scripts.setup: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run ca:login && pnpm run build:ui && pnpm run publish:ui:patch && pnpm run install:app
